name: ProCentury Corporation
description: ProCentury Corporation was a specialty property and casualty insurance holding company based in Westerville, Ohio. The company focused on marketing and underwriting general liability, commercial property, and multi-peril insurance products specifically tailored for small and mid-sized businesses. ProCentury operated through its subsidiaries to provide niche insurance solutions in the United States market. The company was publicly traded on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol PROS before it was acquired and ceased to exist as an independent entity.
